nasb.text: And each went straight forward; wherever the spirit was about to go, they would go, without turning as they went.

esv.text: And each went straight forward. Wherever the spirit would go, they went, without turning as they went.

cnv.text: 牠們都是朝著臉孔的方向行走。靈往哪裡去，牠們就往哪裡去。牠們走動的時候，都不必轉身。

ccb.text: 耶和华的灵往哪里去，他们也往哪里去，移动时不用转身。
